name: Service Autopilot Lawn Care Management API
what_it_does: Service Autopilot REST API for lawn care and landscaping business management platform. Enables AI agents to manage customer accounts and job schedules, handle estimates and invoicing, track crew and route management, process payments, manage client communication and automations, access job history and profitability data, and integrate lawn care business data with accounting and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing customer accounts and scheduled service jobs from lawn care operations agents
Generating estimates and invoices from field service billing agents
Optimizing crew routing from scheduling efficiency agents
Processing payments and tracking accounts receivable from billing automation agents
not_for: Commercial landscaping at enterprise scale without small-business focus
HVAC and plumbing without lawn care and green industry workflows
Pest control without landscaping service scheduling workflows
best_when: A small to mid-sized lawn care or landscaping business using Service Autopilot wants AI agents to automate scheduling, estimating, invoicing, and client communication workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer property and contact data requires careful handling. Employee routing and GPS data requires compliance with applicable privacy and labor regulations.

auth.notes: Service Autopilot uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials with full data access. No granular scope control. API available for integration development.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free trial available
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-user pricing; Pro and Pro Plus tiers; API on Pro Plus
pricing.notes: Dallas, Texas company. Founded 2009. Focus on small to mid-market lawn care and landscaping. Automations feature for trigger-based client communication. Competes with Jobber for green industry SMBs.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer property and employee GPS routing data requires privacy compliance
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
API access restricted to Pro Plus plan
Small business focus — automation triggers are core feature; verify overlap with custom agents
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer and employee field service data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Small-business lawn care platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer property and field service data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency.
